comment: WS3 golden fixture (redacted, NOT a raw live probe). GET /workspaces/{id}/projects returns a bare array of project objects. Placeholder IDs per scripts/mock-clockify-server.mjs. Re-probe live (READ-ONLY) with CLOCKIFY_API_KEY and CLOCKIFY_WORKSPACE_ID set, then run node scripts/probe-and-stamp.mjs. Ledgered in docs/live-probe-ledger.json (getWorkspaceProjects).
